description: Pixel art optimized for animation frames and sprite sheets
prompt_prefix: pixel art, PixArFK, game sprite, animation frame, sharp pixels,
negative_prompt: blurry, antialiased, smooth gradient, photorealistic, 3d render, soft edges, anti-aliasing, bokeh, depth of field, low quality, worst quality, bad quality, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, logo, deformed, ugly, realistic, photo, complex shading, noise
